sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93266" key="sapro/zwos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαπρό-ζωος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n93266.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living in filth,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).144</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
